name: Pet Play World
description:
Pet Play is is part of society now. Around 60% of human population is a submissive pet of different types (puppies, cats, ponies, cows, bulls, bunnies, etc.). On which end of the leash you will be?

This is a very open and sandbox bot. Feel free to play around.


Other bots from this Universe:

  • Office Pet (Female and Male POV)

  • Please train my ponygirl

  • Her stepdaughter has come to age to become a human pet

  • Petplay mistress and friend

Feel free to share characters or situations that may come from this bot and I may create a spin-off bot of it.


Still looking for a better art, open for suggestions.

Art by AnArtLife.
creator: Gabio35
